ab: azua bisangay tja pudringayan ta qecev, azua padjavatan tja pudringayan ta seluc avanazau ququlidan.
ch: A:田鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: manumaya, pacevacevak aken! djaljepan inika ken a djemamadjamaq.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: ku tuluwai anga sun a mumalj tuazua masanmusalj tu kemuda semanaya.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: wa! penakaleva aravac! nu pudringay aken nutjaivililj tjara iken a makadjamaq anga.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: qaqacan anga ravac alja cemel i vavua, sau alapu ta drukudrukung a ma ubav, itjen a vaik a mavavua.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: pininu a dru’udru’ung?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: izua i ljaqediqedi ta dradra’uyan, nu semaumaqan sun ta ubav isupacuni.
ch: A:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: kinemenem itjen a malap, avan a mavuciq sun, radjai aravac a dru’udru’ung.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷，鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: inika tja djuladjulatan a ku dringay!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: izainu a su dringay?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: izua i patekuteku tuazua kasiv.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: awa susipaqenetj?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: ku pinukeljangan a pimaza, kemeljang aken tu ku pininu a dringay.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: rumue aicu, tja sikiciqaciqav cu a mapana.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: neka nu nia rumue, nu kiciqav amen avan a sipanadinadip a izua.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: inika napavala a semeljudj tua sipanadinadip, tului anga ken nutjaivililj ui?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: ui lja! ari vaiki anga nutjaivililj a panadip.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: saka ku tuluwai anga nutjaivililj tua seman rumue.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: milalualuag anga su panadip, tjara izua anga ciqav a namakelai! pakirimu a remakac.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: galjuanan, midradruqai aravac ca vare’ur. tjimazaken a remakac tua panadip, sau sazuau a malap tua ami.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: rakacu a pasa maza alja ciqav, ku pusaladjai anga remakac.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊，我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: aitja nanguaq auta! napakaliav itjen tucu a qadav, namapeljuq anga ca tja purur.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: pai cikeli a kirimu sa tja pangapangalji a masantalj.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
